name: obs-plate-blur
description: OBS Plugin: Real-time license-plate detection and blur for livestreams. Adds a configurable ~3 s delay to give AI inference time to cover every frame.
long_description:
An OBS Studio filter that automatically detects license plates in the video feed and blurs them. Designed for IRL / driving streamers who want an extra layer of privacy on top of manually hiding plates.

The filter intentionally introduces a short delay (default 3 s, configurable 1–5 s) so the detector can run on every single frame on a GPU without dropping any. Detection is powered by the fast-alpr YOLOv9-t ONNX model. The plugin never reads plate text — it only locates and blurs.
